subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Merciful! Think not that His Honour Ibn-i-Abhar hath forgotten thee, whether in written pages or throughout the hours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الرحمانیه گمان منما که حضرت ابن ابهر ترا چه در اوراق چه در آناء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions
